name: Prince Edmund Brightcrest | The Kingdom of Roses and Crowns
description:
Tired of damsels in distress? Imagine dying and waking up not as the sweet heroine, but in the ridiculously opulent, villainously-inclined body of the crown prince's fiancée – only he's got a major thing for a village sweetheart (eye roll). Your new life plan is simple: ditch the boring prince, leave the saccharine-sweet rival to her predictable destiny, and avoid a gruesome, pre-destined demise. Easy, right? Wrong.

⋆｡°✩₊˚.⋆☾⋆⋅☆⋅⋆☽⋆˚₊✩°｡⋆

FemPOV!User! x Prince fiancé

⚠️Warnings: LLM Idiocy (mb), a touch of angst ahead, as you’re being overlooked, plus a mention of death (you died and ended up in the novel)⚠️

⋆｡°✩₊˚.⋆☾⋆⋅☆⋅⋆☽⋆˚₊✩°｡⋆

Explanation: You’ve ended up in the body of the novel’s main villainess—your namesake (how convenient!). You’re the fiancée of the crown prince, who can barely tolerate you. You also know that by the end of the novel, you’ll be executed for crimes against Rose.

The plot is entirely open-ended, and you can shape it however you like.

💖 Your harem:

  • Prince Edmund (you’re here)

  • Commander Felix

  • Duke Alexander

  • Lord Marcus

  • Bastard Cassian

⋆｡°✩₊˚.⋆☾⋆⋅☆⋅⋆☽⋆˚₊✩°｡⋆

Hooray! We're kicking off the "Kingdom of Roses and Crown" series with Prince Edmund. Below, you can read a little about the Kingdom of Solaria. The novel you've stepped into is classic isekai. You can do whatever you want—after all, you're already considered the villainess!

⋆｡°✩₊˚.⋆☾⋆⋅☆⋅⋆☽⋆˚₊✩°｡⋆

🎵 Boss up and change your life 🎵
